name: env-no-nondeterministic
notes: The check's pass/fail hinges on reaching a live external host over the network, but it is declared as an ordinary deterministic command with no nondeterministic flag, passPolicy, or precondition, so a network blip or host outage will be misread as a code failure.

repoFiles.README.md:
# Order Service

A small internal service that exposes a `/health` endpoint on port 8080. It is deployed on the internal network at 192.168.50.40 and should return HTTP 200 with a JSON status body when healthy.

contract.goal: The order service health endpoint responds correctly once the service is deployed.

items.description: Fix service/health.py so the /health endpoint returns HTTP 200 with status ok once the service has started successfully.
items.expectedOutput: A GET request to http://192.168.50.40:8080/health returns HTTP 200.

check.command: $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://192.168.50.40:8080/health -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 }
